@@ -15,2 +15,3 @@

@@ -19,2 +20,3 @@

 from ..utils._tags import _safe_tags
@@ -80,2 +82,3 @@
         """
+        X_original = X
         # note: we use _safe_tags instead of _get_tags because this is a
@@ -89,2 +92,11 @@
         )
+
+        # Feature selectors only remove columns. When pandas output is
+        # requested, select directly from the input dataframe so that pandas
+        # extension and per-column dtypes are preserved. Validation above is
+        # still performed on the input, as it is for the default output.
+        if _get_output_config("transform", self)["dense"] == "pandas" and hasattr(
+            X_original, "iloc"
+        ):
+            X = X_original
         return self._transform(X)
@@ -103,3 +115,3 @@
             raise ValueError("X has a different shape than during fitting.")
-        return X[:, safe_mask(X, mask)]
+        return _safe_indexing(X, safe_mask(X, mask), axis=1)
